|Date, Time                 |Type             |Title            |Notes                                     |
|---------------------------|-----------------|-----------------|------------------------------------------|
|02-Apr-2026                |Conference       |PLAN day         |                                           |
|07-Apr-2026                |Conference       |[Niercongres](https://nierstichting.nl/niercongres)|   |
|13-Apr-2026, 10:00-11:00   |Biweekly meeting |Café Creatinine  |**Talk:** Sanne on nPCR differences between HDF and HD|
|11-May-2026, 10:00-11:00   |Biweekly meeting |Café Creatinine  |                                          |
|25-May-2026, 10:00-11:00   |Biweekly meeting |Café Creatinine  |                                          |
|03-Jun-2026 to 07-Jun-2026 |Conference       |[ERA](https://www.era-online.org/events/glasgow-2026/)              |                                          |
|08-Jun-2026, 10:00-11:00   |Biweekly meeting |Café Creatinine  |                                          |
|18-Jun-2026 to 19-Jun-2026 |Conference       |[DCVA-NLHI](https://congress2026.heart-institute.nl/)     |                                          |
|22-Jun-2026, 10:00-11:00   |Biweekly meeting |Café Creatinine  |                                          |
|26-Jun-2026                |Conference       |New Kids on the Block|                                      |
|26-Jun-2026                |Conference       |TCU Research & Innovation symposium|                        |
|30-Jun-2026, 12:15         |Defence          |Improving patient-centered care: focusing on patients and their caregivers|Esmee Driehuis (UMCU)
|06-Jul-2026, 10:00-11:00   |Biweekly meeting |Café Creatinine  |                                          |
|20-Jul-2026, 10:00-11:00   |Biweekly meeting |Café Creatinine  |                                          |
